projects.title: Personal Portfolio Site
projects.description: Create a professional portfolio website to showcase your projects and skills using reusable React components and basic styling.

projects.title: Task Management Dashboard
projects.description: Build a functional task tracker with features for adding, deleting, and marking tasks as complete, using state management and local storage.

projects.title: e-Commerce Product Browser
projects.description: Develop a product browsing application with category filtering, search functionality, and a shopping cart using React Router and Context API.
